characters.name: Characters
characters.description: The following is a list of characters featured within the Bratz series. It features doll characters, character who have only appeared on screen, non-human characters and characters that have only appeared in books. Please note that this list a work in progress. If you're on mobile, please switch to desktop mode so this page displays properly.
